title: run_sse_stream silently discards errors with no comment
description: client_task.rs run_sse_stream: both error paths use bare 'Err(_) => return' with no comment. A contributor cannot tell (a) why the error is not forwarded to the UI or the sse_tx channel, (b) what categories of error are expected here vs unexpected, or (c) whether the silence is intentional or an oversight. The StreamEnded notification sent by spawn_sse_task after run_sse_stream returns is the mechanism, but that connection is not stated. Fix: add a brief comment on each Err arm explaining that the error triggers reconnect via the StreamEnded notification in the caller.
close_reason: run_sse_stream now sends all notifications explicitly; exit paths are self-documenting
